name: core.openwop.workflows.it-support
description: Real-work workflow pack (RFC 0013, ADR 0149) — the IT / Support cluster: Incident Triage & Major-Incident Comms. Classifies an incoming alert/ticket, then a core.flow.if routes routine incidents to a recommended KB article + a ticket (Jira) and major incidents to cadence stakeholder updates (Slack); finally a post-incident summary. Major-incident sends are human-gated. All tenant values are run parameters (replay-deterministic). Resolves on hosts shipping the kb + http + ai + chat + integration packs. Published under core.openwop.workflows.* (openwop-team key).
author: openwop
